reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify who wrote the English language opera Maria Golovin.
2. Using that writer, determine the person described as an Italian-American composer and librettist and return the name.
original_final_question: Which Italian-American composer and librettist wrote the English language opera, Maria Golovin? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Maria Golovin was written by Gian Carlo Menotti, and Gian Carlo Menotti is described as an Italian-American composer and librettist. -> Gian Carlo Menotti
